## 📊 Impact Assessment
<!-- How will this feature impact the project? -->

**Complexity:** 
- [ ] Low - Simple addition, minimal changes
- [ ] Medium - Moderate complexity, some refactoring needed
- [ ] High - Complex feature, significant changes required

**Priority:**
- [ ] Low - Nice to have
- [ ] Medium - Should have
- [ ] High - Must have
